Recommended Resources
  • Our Tools They Deserve: Why Adults Choose Retribution, How Students Can Practice Restoration, airick journey crabill
  • Non-Violent Communication, Marshall B. Rosenberg
  • The 4 Disciplines of Execution, Chris McChesney, Sean Covey, & Jim Huling
  • Never Split The Difference, Chris Voss
  • The Speed of Trust, Stephen Covey
  • Great On Their Behalf: Why School Boards Fail, How Yours Can Become Effective, airick journey crabill
  • Effective School Boards Framework, EffectiveSchoolBoards.com
  • Center for Non-Violent Communication
  • Trauma Informed Care Project
  • National Center for Trauma-informed Care
  • Circle Forward: Building A Restorative School Community, Kay Pranis & Carolyn Boyes-Watson
  • Implementing Restorative Practices In Schools, Margaret Thorsborne, & Peta Blood
  • Better Than Carrots Or Sticks, Dominique Smith, Douglas Fisher, & Nancy Frey
  • Leadership and Self-Deception, The Arbinger Institute
  • Immunity To Change, Robert Kegan & Lisa Lahey


Research
  • School Readiness and Self-Regulation: A Developmental Psychobiological Approach, Blair, C., & Raver, C. C.
  • Self-Regulation Failure: An Overview, Baumeister, R. F., & Heatherton, T. F.
  • Metacognition and Learning: Conceptual and Methodological Considerations, Veenman, M. V., Van Hout-Wolters, & Afflerbach, P.
  • Emotion-Related Self-Regulation and Its Relation to Children's Maladjustment, Eisenberg, N., Spinrad, T. L., & Eggum, N. D. (2010)
  • Core Language Skills in Children with Emotional and Behavioral Disorders, Hooper, S. R., Roberts, J. E., Zeisel, S. A., & Poe, M. D.
  • Early Adolescents’ Perceptions of the Classroom Social Environment, Motivational Beliefs, and Engagement, Patrick, H., Ryan, A. M., & Kaplan, A.
  • Long-Term Effects of Self-Regulation Education: A Meta-Analysis, De Boer, H., Donker, A. S., & Kostons, D. D. N. M.
  • Learner-Centered Teacher-Student Relationships Are Effective: A Meta-Analysis, Cornelius-White, J.
  • The Prosocial Classroom: Teacher SEC in Relation to Student and Classroom Outcomes, Jennings, P. A., & Greenberg, M. T.
  • Social Competence at School: Relation Between Social Responsibility and Academic Achievement, Wentzel, K. R.
  • Self-Discipline Outdoes IQ in Predicting Academic Performance of Adolescents, Duckworth, A. L., & Seligman, M. E. P.
  • How Can Primary School Students Learn Self-Regulated Learning Strategies Most Effectively? A Meta-Analysis on Self-Regulation Training Programmes, Dignath, C., Buettner, G., & Langfeldt, H. P.

Restorative
Practices.
